titleStmt.title: SII 25.148: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 148. (A.R. No. 148 of 1908.) KUḶḶAPUṞAM, PERIYAKULAM TALUK, MADURAI DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the viṇāyaka shrine in the Nīlakaṇṭhīśvara temple.

This damaged inscription records the oral order of the king issued at the instance of Tiruvuḍaiyār (his queen) to the dēvakanmis and the śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple of Rājarājayīśvaram-uḍaiyār of Rājachūḍāmaṇichaturvēdimaṅgalam in Aḷa-nāḍu exempting the taxes on Kārāṇmai lands of 5 mā measured by Āṇmai-Aḻagiyāṉ-kōl in the village Muḍigoṇḍaśōḻanallūr in the above nāḍu along with its income from kaḍamai, antarāyam, veṭṭipāṭṭam, pañjupili, sandivigrahappēṟu, etc., for the various services including tiruppaḍimāṟṟu, to the deity Rājarāja-Īśvaram-uḍaiyār.

The order granting the lands as dēvadāṇa-iṟaiyili was to take effect from the 5th year of this king. The same was attested by several officers including the mantri Tirumalaiyuḍaiyāṉ of Perumaṇalūr in Aṇḍa-nāḍu. It was engraved by the tachchāchāriyaṉ of the temple named Ammai Appaṉ alias Kodukula-āchāriyaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . komāṟapanmarāṉa tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ coṇāṭu ko
ṇṭaruḷiya śrīcuntarapāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu Añcāvatu māṭakkuḷak
kiḻ Aḷanā
ṭṭu Irācacūṭāmaṇic caturvvetimaṅkalattu Irājarāja- yiśvaramuṭaiyār
koyil tevakanmikku civabrāhmaṇaṟku Aruḷic ceyal tiruvāy moḻinta
ruḷiṉapaṭi . Ittevaṟkut tiruppaṭimāṟṟu Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭun nimantaṅka
ḷukku Iṉṉāṭṭu muṭikoṇṭa Ivvūr kaṭamai Iṟukku māṇmaiyaḻaki
yāṉ kolāl Ittevar kārāṇmaiyāy Aṉupavittu varukiṟa nila
m Aiñcumāvum kaṭamai yantarāyam veṭṭi pāṭṭamum pañcupili
cantivikkirakappeṟum maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭaṉavum Añcāvatu
mutal Itte Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭappeṟaveṇumeṉṟu nam
peṇṭukaḷil tiruvuṭaiyār namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil It tevarkkut tiruppaṭi māṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭu
nitta nimantaṅkaḷukku Iṉṉāṭṭu muṭikoṇṭanallūr paṟṟil Ivvūr kaṭamai Iṟukkum kolāl Ittevar kārā
ṇmaiyāka Aṉupavittu varukiṟa nilam Añcumāvuṅ kaṭamai Antarāyamum veṭṭi pāṭṭam pañcu
pili cantivikkirakap peṟum maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭaṉavum Uṭpaṭa tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭṭu na
m Olaiyun tarac coṉṉōm . Ivvāṇṭu mutal kaikkoṇṭu Ippaṭi cantirātittavaṟ celvatāka
k kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭivittuk koḷka Ippaṭi tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉār . Ivai miḻalaik kū
ṟṟattu naṭuviṟ kūṟṟu yāṉ karumāṇikkap pe kāri kiḻavaṅkā yaṉ
Eḻuttu c caturvvetimaṅkalattu Irājarāja Īśvaramuṭaiyār ko
yil te kum Ittevarkkut veṇṭum nivantaṅkaḷukku Iṉṉāṭṭu
muṭikoṇṭa Ivvūr kaṭamai Iṟukkum kolāl Ittevar kārāṇmaiyāy Aṉupavittu va
rukiṟa nilam Añcumāvuṅ kaṭamai Antarāyam veṭṭipāṭṭam pañcupili cantuvikkirakap peṟu
cāvatu mutal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭappeṟaveṇumeṉṟu nam peṇṭukaḷil tiruvuṭai
tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭṭu k Ivāṇṭu mutal kaikkoṇṭu
Ippaṭi cantirātittavaṟ celvatākak kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭivittuk koḷka . Ivai
Aṇṭa nāṭṭup perumaṇalūr mantiri tirumalaiyuṭaiyāṉāṉa cetirāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai
Digital edition of SII 25.148 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
